purpose: Generic governance for schemas, API contracts, event contracts, traceability contracts, and config contracts.
major_version_policy: Within v1, changes should be additive-only unless explicit breaking approval exists.
additive_examples: new enum value when consumers tolerate unknowns
new event type with backward-compatible handler
id_policy: Use type-prefixed ULIDs for generated IDs where applicable, e.g. req_01J..., ac_01J..., test_01J...
environment_policy: No project/environment-specific values in schemas; put mappings in configs/.
